items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario behavior regarding 'Minimum necessary' access enforcement. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific outcomes or results from the simulation of this scenario, making it impossible to confirm whether the expected result was achieved. The lack of concrete evidence to support the validation of the scenario leads to an inconclusive status.
